overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk market area at night. The player approaches a food vendor stall, interacts briefly, then continues exploring the market past various neon signs including Japanese text and 'Brooklyn Barista'.

events.description: slight turn to the left approaching the food stall area
entering denser market area with increased pedestrian presence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market corridor toward the food vendor area

pedestrian with red hair standing near the food stall entrance

entered.detail: green fluorescent tube lights running along the ceiling of the covered walkway
large illuminated sign with Japanese characters '空室あり' indicating vacancy
large rectangular concrete planter with tropical plants
tree trunk illuminated with purple neon lighting
food vendor stall with bright interior lighting visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a covered cyberpunk market corridor illuminated by green neon ceiling lights and a prominent Japanese vacancy sign. The environment features concrete planters and scattered pedestrians, with a food stall visible ahead emitting bright light.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor stall with bright counter lighting and menu displays

events.description: approaching and stopping at the food vendor counter
turning to leave the food stall area

agents.ego_description: approaching the food counter and standing in front of the vendor, observing the stall interior

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the food counter facing the player
customer with red hair standing at the counter waiting

entered.detail: illuminated menu boards and advertisements hanging above the food counter
industrial metal shelving units with supplies behind the counter
food preparation area with cooking equipment and fluorescent lighting

segments.scene_description: The player stops at a brightly lit food vendor stall, facing the vendor behind the counter. The stall features metal shelving, cooking equipment, and illuminated menu displays overhead. A customer waits nearby as the player observes the scene before turning to leave.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market area with various vendor stalls and prominent neon signage

events.description: passing from food stall area into open market corridor with Brooklyn Barista sign visible
moving into area dominated by red and purple neon lighting from signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the market area, looking at various stalls and neon signs while navigating around obstacles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera down the market corridor
pedestrian standing near the Brooklyn Barista entrance

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading 'Brooklyn Barista' on the right wall
covered market stall with white canopy and metal frame
metal escalator structure with green steps leading upward
illuminated vending machine with glowing product displays
chain link fence enclosing a storage or construction area

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the food stall and explores the open market area, passing the prominent red 'Brooklyn Barista' neon sign on the right. The environment features various market stalls, a vending machine, and an escalator structure, with lighting shifting to dominant red and purple neon hues as the player moves deeper into the market.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk market that shifts from a green-hued corridor into a vibrant red and purple commercial hub. It begins by moving through a covered walkway illuminated by green ceiling lights and a Japanese vacancy sign, passing concrete planters and pedestrians toward a glowing food stall. As the camera reaches the stall, the perspective pauses to face the vendor amidst metal shelving and illuminated menu displays before turning away to resume the walk. The scene then opens into a wider market area, passing a prominent red Brooklyn Barista sign and a vending machine. Finally, the environment expands past an escalator structure as the lighting transitions into dominant red and purple neon hues deeper within the district.
